title: Protomanly's weather mod 32x
description: This Resource pack will upgrade the pixels from 16x16 to 32x32
body:
This resource pack will enhance the quality of your pmweather blocks to 32x32 which I would prefer to use 32x faithful classic in my opinion which I will put the link under this text.
https://database.faithfulpack.net/packs/Classic-32x-Java/Classic%20Faithful%2032x%20-%201.21.1.zip

This link will download the faithful 32x classic pack instantly

OR

You could use the modern 32x faithful down below

https://database.faithfulpack.net/packs/32x-Java/Experimental/Faithful%2032x%20-%201.21.1%20Experimental.zip

HERE IS THE PICTURE OF THE BLOCKS![Here is the 32x classic faithful with the 32x pmweather blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c47d10c4ef3af4f111a8f8e1608f699386ae5f1c.png)
